headline: Library Access Drops as 340 School Libraries Lack Books and Staff
context: MOE audit found 340 school libraries effectively non-functional due to absent librarians and outdated collections.

cards.big: 340 school libraries have no dedicated librarian and fewer than 500 books each
cards.sub: MOE benchmark requires minimum 3,000 titles and 1 trained media specialist

cards.big: Average book age in affected libraries is 14 years with 60% published before 2012
cards.sub: Outdated collections fail to engage students or support current curricula

cards.big: Students with access to quality school libraries score 18% higher on reading assessments
cards.sub: PIRLS data consistently links library access to literacy achievement

cards.big: Singapore allocates RM45 per student annually for library acquisitions versus Malaysia's RM8
cards.sub: 5-fold funding gap explains collection quality differences between countries

cards.big: A school library without books or librarians is just a room with empty shelves
Should every school be required to employ a qualified librarian and meet minimum collection standards
